name: global-ai-adoption-heatmap
description: Global AI Adoption Heat Map - Open-source platform for tracking AI adoption worldwide

scripts.dev:clean: docker compose down -v && rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.test:watch: concurrently 'npm run test:watch -w frontend' 'npm run test:watch -w backend'
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w frontend && npm run lint:fix -w backend
scripts.format: npm run format -w frontend && npm run format -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend

author: Luca Ruboni <lucaruboni@gmail.com>
